name: Six Flags Discovery Kingdom
formerNames: Marine World  Marine World Africa USA  The New Marine World Theme Park  Six Flags Marine World
description: Six Flags Discovery Kingdom (formerly known as Six Flags Marine World, Marine World, The New Marine World Theme Park, and Marine World Africa USA) is a 135-acre (55 ha) animal theme park located in Vallejo, California, off of Interstate 80 between San Francisco and Sacramento.  The park includes a variety of roller coasters and other amusement rides.  Six Flags Discovery Kingdom has been part of the Six Flags chain of amusement parks since 1999.
